title: Update Marin listings price range to 2-2.5M

log.context: Update Marin listings price range to 2-2.5M

Done. Summary of what happened:

- `/mnt/data/temporal-workflows/criteria.json`: Marin SFH `min_price` changed from 900000 → 2000000, `max_price` from 1300000 → 2500000
- Committed and pushed to GitHub
- Terminated old `listings-marin-sfh` workflow (was running with old price range baked in)
- Restarted `temporal-worker.service` — on startup it re-schedules all cron workflows from `criteria.json`, so the new workflow picked up the updated range
- Discord notified
